name: Pancake Batter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, salt, and sugar. Mix well.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, and melted butter until well mixed.
3. Gradually add the egg mixture to the flour mixture, stirring continuously until just combined.
4. Cover the batter and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to overnight.
5. Before cooking, adjust the consistency of the batter by adding more milk as needed.
